tags.name: app-shell
tags.description:
Slots:

  * `object Object],[object Object],[object Object` {} - 

  * `app-content` {} - The place for the dynamic application content

Properties:

  * `styles` - 

  * `appConfigs` - The current global application configuration state.

  * `_uiModeIcon` {`"dark_mode" | "light_mode" | "routine"`} - The icon associated with the current color scheme mode.

  * `configsDialog` - Reference to the configuration dialog.

  * `fabMenu` - Reference to the FAB menu component.

  * `settingsFabConfig` - The configuration for the settings FAB.

  * `connectDialog` - Reference to the connect dialog.

  * `connectFab` - Reference to the connect FAB.
This is an MdFab component.

  * `connectFabConfig` - 

  * `_openDialogCount` {`number`} - 

  * `onFabChangeBind` - 

  * `onFabConfigBind` - 

  * `onColorSchemeChange` - Event handler for color scheme changes.
Updates the UI icon, Material theme variables, and meta theme color.

  * `onAppConfigsChange` - Syncs the component state with the global application configuration.
